 ---
title: "RCBD Missing Data Simulation Study"
output: html_document
---
# Packages Used
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(tictoc)
```

# Missing Data Generating Function
```{r}
missing_sim <- function(blocks,
                        treatments,
                        sigma_b,
                        sigma,
                        missing_pct,
                        n_missing_sims) {

  # Generate design matrix for a Randomized Complete Block Design (RCBD)
  data_complete <- expand.grid(
    block = factor(1:blocks),
    treatment = factor(1:treatments)
  )

  # Simulation parameters under the Null Hypothesis (no treatment effect)
  alpha_t <- rep(0, treatments)
  beta_b <- rnorm(blocks, 0, sigma_b) # Random block effects

  # Construct true underlying linear predictor
  mu_tb <- alpha_t[data_complete$treatment] + beta_b[data_complete$block]

  # Generate homoscedastic error term
  e <- rnorm(nrow(data_complete), mean = 0, sd = sigma)

  data_complete$response <- mu_tb + e


  # Analyze complete dataset once per outer simulation
  complete_model <- aov(response ~ treatment + block, data_complete)

  complete_anova_tbl <- anova(complete_model) |>
    tidy()

  complete_treatment_row <- complete_anova_tbl |>
    filter(term == "treatment")

  complete_F_stat <- complete_treatment_row$statistic
  complete_p_value <- complete_treatment_row$p.value

  # Track empirical Type I Error rates (alpha = 0.05)
  complete_reject_F <- complete_p_value < 0.05

  # Track Family-Wise Error Rate (FWER) via Tukey's HSD pairwise adjustments
  complete_tukey_reject <- TukeyHSD(complete_model,"treatment")$treatment |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    pull(`p adj`) |>
    (\(x) any(x < 0.05))()

  complete_R2 <- summary(
    lm(response ~ treatment + block, data_complete)
  )$r.squared

  # Extract Mean Squares for distribution analysis
  complete_MS_error <- complete_anova_tbl |>
    filter(term == "Residuals") |>
    pull(meansq)

  complete_MS_treatment <- complete_anova_tbl |>
    filter(term == "treatment") |>
    pull(meansq)

  complete_results <- tibble(
    missing_simulation = NA_integer_,
    method = "complete",
    F_stat = complete_F_stat,
    p_value = complete_p_value,
    reject_F = complete_reject_F,
    R2 = complete_R2,
    tukey_reject = complete_tukey_reject,
    MSE = complete_MS_error,
    MSa = complete_MS_treatment,
    n_missing = 0L,
    missing_proportion = 0
  )


  # Repeat missing data generation for the same complete dataset
  missing_results <- map_dfr(1:n_missing_sims, ~ {

      # Generate Missing Completely at Random (MCAR) responses
      data_missing <- data_complete

      n_missing <- round(nrow(data_missing) * missing_pct)

      # Resample missing observations until every treatment and block
      # retains at least one observed response
      valid_missing_pattern <- FALSE

      while (!valid_missing_pattern) {

        missing_rows <- sample(
          1:nrow(data_missing),
          n_missing,
          replace = FALSE
        )

        observed_data <- data_missing[-missing_rows, ]

        valid_missing_pattern <-
          n_distinct(observed_data$treatment) == treatments &&
          n_distinct(observed_data$block) == blocks
      }

      data_missing$response[missing_rows] <- NA


      # Apply unconditional mean imputation
      data_mean <- data_missing

      data_mean$response[is.na(data_mean$response)] <-
        mean(data_mean$response, na.rm = TRUE)


      # Apply conditional mean imputation by treatment
      data_CMIT <- data_missing |>
        group_by(treatment) |>
        mutate(
          response = if_else(
            is.na(response),
            mean(response, na.rm = TRUE),
            response
          )
        ) |>
        ungroup()


      # Apply conditional mean imputation by block
      data_CMIB <- data_missing |>
        group_by(block) |>
        mutate(
          response = if_else(
            is.na(response),
            mean(response, na.rm = TRUE),
            response
          )
        ) |>
        ungroup()


      # Apply linear regression imputation
      data_linear <- data_missing

      imputation_model <- lm(response ~ treatment + block, data_linear)

      data_linear$response[is.na(data_linear$response)] <- predict(
        imputation_model,
        newdata = data_linear[is.na(data_linear$response), ]
      )


      # Combine imputed datasets for analysis
      simulation_datasets <- list(
        mean_imp = data_mean,
        linear_imp = data_linear,
        CMIT = data_CMIT,
        CMIB = data_CMIB
      )


      # Fit standard additive Two-Way ANOVA Model for each imputation method
      method_results <- imap_dfr(simulation_datasets, ~ {

          data <- .x
          method <- .y

          model <- aov(response ~ treatment + block, data)

          anova_tbl <- anova(model) |>
            tidy()

          treatment_row <- anova_tbl |>
            filter(term == "treatment")

          F_stat <- treatment_row$statistic
          p_value <- treatment_row$p.value

          # Track empirical Type I Error rates (alpha = 0.05)
          reject_F <- p_value < 0.05

          # Track Family-Wise Error Rate (FWER) via Tukey's HSD pairwise adjustments
          tukey_reject <- TukeyHSD(model, "treatment")$treatment |>
            as.data.frame() |>
            pull(`p adj`) |>
            (\(x) any(x < 0.05))()

          R2 <- summary(lm(response ~ treatment + block, data))$r.squared

          # Extract Mean Squares for distribution analysis
          MS_error <- anova_tbl |>
            filter(term == "Residuals") |>
            pull(meansq)

          MS_treatment <- anova_tbl |>
            filter(term == "treatment") |>
            pull(meansq)

          tibble(
            method = method,
            F_stat = F_stat,
            p_value = p_value,
            reject_F = reject_F,
            R2 = R2,
            tukey_reject = tukey_reject,
            MSE = MS_error,
            MSa = MS_treatment,
            n_missing = n_missing,
            missing_proportion = n_missing / nrow(data_missing)
          )
        }
      )

      method_results
    },
    .id = "missing_simulation"
  ) |>
    mutate(missing_simulation = as.integer(missing_simulation))


  # Combine complete and missing-data results
  bind_rows(complete_results, missing_results)
}
```

# RCBD MISSING-DATA SIMULATIONS & EVALUATION

```{r}
set.seed(123)

simulation_results <- map_dfr(1:1000, ~ missing_sim(7, 8, 3, 3, 0.25, 10),
                              .id = "dataset") |>
  mutate(dataset = as.integer(dataset))

# Aggregate operating performance characteristics across imputation methods
results <- simulation_results |>
  group_by(method) |>
  summarise(
    type1_error = mean(reject_F),
    mean_F = mean(F_stat),
    var_F = var(F_stat),
    mean_MSa = mean(MSa),
    var_MSa = var(MSa),
    mean_MSE = mean(MSE),
    var_MSE = var(MSE),
    mean_R2 = mean(R2),
    tukey_fwer = mean(tukey_reject)
  )
```
